name: Chicken Soup with Guacamole
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------TOPPING----------------------------------
2 Avocados, peeled and sliced into 1-inch pieces
1 Tomato, large, diced
4 Scallions, with tops, sliced
1 Chile serrano, minced
2 tablespoons Cilantro, chopped
2 Limes, halved
Make the chicken soup from a well-raised hen with pieces of meat, skinned and boned. The pieces should be fairly large; this is a main dish soup. Cook the rice in the soup.
Pour the soup into hot earthenware cazuelas or onion-soup pots and spoon on the uncooked topping. Serve with warm tortillas.
Mrs. Rasmussen's Book of One-Arm Cookery
Mary Lasswell
